title: Electricity
content:
Out of fiery contacts...
    Rushing auras of steel
    Touching and whirled apart...
    Out of the charged phallases
    Of iron leaping
    Female and male,
    Complete, indivisible, one,
    Fused into light.
meaning:
Lola Ridge's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Electricity"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
